summary: ThreadComb Session 1 — Foundation: comprehensive backend + frontend testing. 22/22 pytest backend tests pass. All 7 frontend pages render correctly with proper auth guard, redirect-to-login behavior, sidebar nav, empty-state dashboard, and Emergent Auth redirect URL. Standalone run_seed.py executes end-to-end. ACTION_POLICY and all MongoDB invariants (10 collections, niche_graph seed with p25/p75 ratios, data_classification block on every creator) verified.
critical_code_review_comments: All MongoDB writes go through services/mongodb_writer.py (verified via grep — zero direct insert_one/update_one outside the writer module).
ACTION_POLICY is implemented as Python code at services/action_policy.py (not a prompt).
data_classification block is appended on every write via _build_classification_block in mongodb_writer.py.
Sensitive gmail_secret_path is explicitly stripped from GET /api/auth/creator/{id} responses.
DELETE /api/auth/creator/{id} cascades across 9 related collections with deleted_counts returned.
niche_graph seed satisfies spec invariants: data_source='pre_training', confidence=0.3, tier='aggregate', p25=p50*0.65, p75=p50*1.55.
Onboarding step-3 correctly maps follower_bucket '50k_200k' → follower_tier 'mid'.
Auth guard at /app/frontend/src/app/onboarding/layout.tsx correctly calls /api/auth/me and redirects to /login on 401 (verified via cookie-clear test).
Login page redirects to https://auth.emergentagent.com/?redirect=<encoded /auth/callback URL> as required by the Emergent Auth playbook.
Dashboard correctly redirects to step-1-platform when onboarding incomplete (defensive UX — not flagged as a bug).
Step 4 Gmail-connect is INTENTIONALLY MOCKED per Session 1 scope — no real OAuth performed, gmail_connected=true set directly. Documented and expected.
Minor: Login button does not have an `aria-disabled` attribute when in loading state — low priority.
test_credentials: Backend tests create their own TEST_*@threadcomb.dev creators per test (cleaned up via DELETE). For browser auth-guard testing, a simulated creator_sessions doc was inserted directly into MongoDB (creator_test_ed57d025 / test_session_ce788d2a85804064) — please delete during cleanup or leave for next iteration.
seed_data_creation: Inserted one simulated creator+session for protected-route testing (creator_test_ed57d025). niche_graph already had 10 pre-training docs (re-seed is idempotent).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_threadcomb_session1.py is the regression baseline — run with `cd /app/backend && python -m pytest tests/test_threadcomb_session1.py -v`. All Session 1 acceptance criteria from the request are covered. For protected-page browser testing, insert a creator + creator_sessions doc into MongoDB and set cookie 'session_token' before navigation; dashboard requires onboarding_step >= 4-ish (verified — redirects to /onboarding/step-1-platform when step=0).
